title: The Best Rap Album Grammy Nominees For 2026 Are Finally Here
text: Hot New Hip Hop reports on the 2026 Grammy Best Rap Album nominees. The Recording Academy revealed the five nominees for Best Rap Album at the 2026 Grammy Awards on November 7, 2025: Kendrick Lamar (GNX), Tyler, The Creator (CHROMAKOPIA), Clipse (Let God Sort Em Out), GloRilla (GLORIOUS), and JID (God Does Like Ugly). Notable Details: The article notes that three of the five nominees came out in 2024, which aligns with patterns seen in previous Grammy ceremonies. One significant omission many observers anticipated was Playboi Carti's MUSIC album, which marked his return after an extended hiatus. The publication acknowledges this sparked discussion among fans about which projects deserved recognition. The awards ceremony was scheduled for February 1, 2026. Kendrick Lamar arrived as a particularly strong contender, having submitted entries across multiple categories following his prominent cultural moment in hip-hop that year.
